nasb.text: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice; And let them say among the nations, “The Lord reigns.”

esv.text: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice, and let them say among the nations, “The Lord reigns!”

cnv.text: 願天歡喜，願地歡呼， 願人在萬國中說：‘耶和華作王了！’

ccb.text: 愿天欢喜，愿地快乐； 愿他们向列国宣告， ‘耶和华是王！’
